title: Light Nourishment
subtitle: Adapting to changing appetite
description: At this stage, you may begin to notice slight changes in appetite or mild discomfort. Choosing light, simple, and easy-to-digest foods can help you stay nourished while keeping you comfortable.
what_to_expect: Mild changes in appetite or food preferences
Possible early nausea or sensitivity to smells
Need for lighter and more frequent meals
nutrition_focus: Eat small, frequent meals throughout the day
Choose light and easily digestible foods
Avoid staying on an empty stomach for long periods
recommended_foods: Simple foods like khichdi, dal-rice, and porridge
Fruits like banana, apple, and orange
Light vegetables like bottle gourd, pumpkin, and carrots
Protein sources like lentils, curd, and eggs (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Very spicy, oily, or heavy foods
hydration: Sip water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Eating small and simple meals can help you stay comfortable and nourished.

diabetes.personalized_description: Managing smaller and frequent meals can help maintain stable energy levels.
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Frequent and balanced meals can help you feel more stable.

anemia.personalized_description: Even with reduced appetite, including iron-rich foods remains important.
nutrition_focus: Include iron-rich foods in small portions
Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Small portions can still support your strength effectively.

hypertension.personalized_description: Light and balanced meals can support comfort and stable blood pressure.
hypertension.reassurance: Simple meals can help you feel more comfortable and balanced.

thyroid.personalized_description: Maintaining consistency in meals supports overall balance despite appetite changes.
thyroid.reassurance: Even light meals can support your body effectively.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on small, simple, and regular meals can help maintain balance.
priority_nutrition: Avoid skipping meals or long gaps
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Gentle and consistent nourishment supports your overall well-being.
